parameters.query: WITH expired AS (UPDATE public.tawd_subscriptions SET status = 'past_due', grace_period_ends_at = NOW() + interval '7 days', dunning_alerts_sent = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'active' AND current_period_end IS NOT NULL AND current_period_end < NOW() RETURNING id), suspended AS (UPDATE public.tawd_subscriptions SET status = 'paused', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'past_due' AND grace_period_ends_at IS NOT NULL AND grace_period_ends_at <= NOW() RETURNING id) SELECT ts.id AS sub_id, ts.clinic_id, ts.price_omr, ts.billing_cycle, ts.grace_period_ends_at, ts.dunning_alerts_sent, tc.name_ar AS clinic_name_ar, tc.name AS clinic_name, tc.phone AS clinic_phone FROM public.tawd_subscriptions ts JOIN public.tawd_clinics tc ON tc.id = ts.clinic_id WHERE ts.status = 'past_due' AND ts.grace_period_ends_at IS NOT NULL AND ts.grace_period_ends_at > NOW() ORDER BY ts.dunning_alerts_sent ASC, ts.grace_period_ends_at ASC;
UPDATE public.tawd_subscriptions SET dunning_alerts_sent = dunning_alerts_sent + 1, last_dunning_alert_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Dunning Message').item.json.sub_id }}';
